title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build a no-code calendar app using Google AI Studio. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations using Gemini's advanced reasoning capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a no-code calendar app in Google AI Studio in roughly six minutes. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations, using Gemini's reasoning capabilities to handle the parsing. It demonstrates a no-code design workflow, showing how an application can be assembled in AI Studio without manual coding.
